search_document:
User Request: Freight cost analysis.

Dashboard Components:
Title: Freight Cost by Month
Type: chart
Description: Trend of freight costs over the months
Title: Freight Cost by Region
Type: table
Description: Freight costs aggregated by region
Title: Total Freight Cost
Type: kpi
Description: Overall freight costs incurred
Title: Freight Cost Distribution by Carrier
Type: chart
Description: Freight costs distributed across different shippers
Title: Freight Cost vs. Revenue
Type: chart
Description: Comparison of freight costs against total revenue

sql_queries.title: Freight Cost by Month
sql_queries.description: Trend of freight costs over the months
sql_queries.sql: SELECT strftime('%Y-%m', OrderDate) AS Month, SUM(Freight) AS TotalFreight FROM Orders GROUP BY Month ORDER BY Month

sql_queries.title: Freight Cost by Region
sql_queries.sql: SELECT ShipRegion, SUM(Freight) AS TotalFreight FROM Orders GROUP BY ShipRegion ORDER BY TotalFreight DESC

sql_queries.title: Total Freight Cost
sql_queries.sql: SELECT SUM(Freight) AS TotalFreight FROM Orders

sql_queries.title: Freight Cost Distribution by Carrier
sql_queries.description: Freight costs distributed across different shippers
sql_queries.sql: SELECT Shippers.CompanyName, SUM(Orders.Freight) AS TotalFreight FROM Orders JOIN Shippers ON Orders.ShipVia = Shippers.ShipperID GROUP BY Shippers.CompanyName ORDER BY TotalFreight DESC

sql_queries.title: Freight Cost vs. Revenue
sql_queries.description: Comparison of freight costs against total revenue
sql_queries.sql: SELECT strftime('%Y-%m', Orders.OrderDate) AS Month, SUM(Orders.Freight) AS TotalFreight, SUM(OrderDetails.UnitPrice * OrderDetails.Quantity * (1 - OrderDetails.Discount)) AS TotalRevenue FROM Orders JOIN "Order Details" AS OrderDetails ON Orders.OrderID = OrderDetails.OrderID GROUP BY Month ORDER BY Month
